name: She’s hitting on you | Shay
description:
This weird emo cashier has just offered you a pack of condoms… and she swears she’s being awesome with this flirt move. Happy Holidays!

Shay works full-time at the convenience store you frequent (to buy snacks? smokes? whatever, that's up to you). From the moment she first laid eyes on you, she was totally gone—literally heart-eyes emoji status. She was always too afraid to make a move... until now.
It’s Christmas, the holiday spirit is high, and Shay is feeling uncharacteristically brave! Her brilliant idea? Offering you a pack of condoms... because, like... you're so pretty... and maybe you could use them? Together?

kinda important: situated in 2000'! so no pulling up tiktok bullshit (i mean u can but... like... you're going to be seen as time-traveler? idk i didnt try, just follow the timeline dude. or not, y'know? wtvr)


ye no extra images. i just genned shay by mistake, and i know i cant gen her again (she is just too pretty and i dont know how tf gen her)
anyways, nice holidays for you all! im still working on my profile (wip)
andddd i changed my writting style (on personality, and now ill start using scenario etc)
please, let me know how it's going!! i need to improve, so ifyou guys see smtgh i can improve/change, PLEASE LET ME KNOW ON THE COMMENTS ty

Trying to improve your RP? Usually, prompts can help. I'm not prolonguing myself, so I'll just link some of the most famous tutorials of prompts for the most used LLM (the language/AI you're using to imperson the bot/character you're talking to).

╰› kolach3's Prompts for JLLM

╰› Astarya's Guide

╰› tutorial to get free messages on DeepSeek, by Saturnine

So, hey! Does the bot keeps misgendering you? Kinda sucks, I know.
Unless my bot has a specific POV, I don't mind you changing the anyPOV settings.
Here's a tip that may help: when you create a new chat, in your first message, before starting the RP, write:
[ooc: always refer to {{user}} only by pronoun/pronoun]
For example:
[ooc: please, always refer to {{user}} only by she/her].
After sending this message, interact with the bot normally. This may fix the issue of the bot misgendering you.
Also: if the bots misgenders you, I'm truly sorry, but this isn't my fault. You can comment in the comment sections and I'll love to help you out.

⤳ How do I gen my images?
🢒 I gen my own images. They're made using AI, so I don't
